'''Ishanna V''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ishanna system/Legends|Ishanna system]]. It housed five [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. The aforementioned stellar objects followed their set individual [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] course, all similarly elliptical.
